title: Scrape and run parasites expanded
description: the scrape and run parasite mod along side all of its optional mods and side mods to alongside the main mods involving the parasites
body:
this modpack is insanely hard to survive especially in the later stages of development for the parasite. do you have what it takes to survive with what may now lurk in your world?

the parasite will naturally spawn in your world at night when the first stage of the infestations of your world will begin, it will gradually get harder and worse as time progresses onwards till eventually your whole world is consumed and is nothing but the parasite

the parasite will convert mobs, transform the terrain, evolve, get stronger with each passing day, they will consume anything and everything, even you. 

this mod carries some quality of life mods to make the experience a little easier with fps enhancement mods to boost fps as this mod comes with lots of new mobs, blocks, bosses, creatures, the main part of the mod is focussed around the parasites. you are not meant to survive this mod in the later stages, this mod will make your world incrediably difficult as time goes on
